subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! The servant of the Glorious Lord, Jinab-i-Isma'il, hath mentioned your names in his letter with joyous tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی بنده رب جلیل جناب اسمعیل در نامه خویش نام شما برده مژده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
